required_preferences.fact: Conducts all mentoring sessions and team meetings exclusively in English, regardless of mentee language background — no longer uses French for work training or staff development.

supersedes.fact: Conducts mentoring sessions exclusively in French to help juniors gain confidence — never mixes languages during training

required_preferences.fact: Adopts structured relaxation techniques (guided breathing or mindfulness) for 10 minutes twice daily during work, in place of stretching breaks, as recommended by his stress management program

supersedes.fact: Takes short stretching breaks every 2 hours during workdays to reduce tension headaches; never goes more than 3 hours without moving

required_preferences.fact: Shifts grocery shopping to flexible evenings based on sister's needs — no longer tied to Wednesday evenings
Travels outside Montreal at least twice a year for cultural festivals — avoids beach vacations
Checks personal finances every Saturday morning — never lets bills wait past their due date
Avoids scheduling non-essential evening activities to ensure he's present at home to assist his mother with bedtime care

persona: A bilingual helpdesk specialist assisting clients in both French and English
